name: Black Bean Chili with Toasted Spice Seasoning
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the beans and place them in a large pot with 8 cups of water. Bring to a boil.
2. Add the minced jalapeno peppers, grated ginger, bay leaf, and half the cilantro. Cover and simmer for 1.5 to 2 hours. Remove from heat and discard the bay leaf.
3. In a separate pot, toast the cumin seeds until they darken slightly. Add the chili powder, oregano, sun-dried tomatoes, and tomatoes. Stir well and bring to a boil. Reduce heat and simmer for 30 minutes.
4. In another bowl, combine the bulgur with boiling water, cover, and let sit for 10 minutes.
5. When the beans are cooked, remove one cup and puree it with some of the cooking liquid. Combine the puree with the remaining beans. Stir in the tomato mixture and bulgur. Season to taste and simmer for an additional 10 minutes.
6. In a small pot over medium heat, place the mustard seeds and cover. Cook until the seeds start to pop. Add the fennel seeds and continue cooking until the popping stops and the seeds darken slightly. Pour over the chili. Add the remaining cilantro and drizzle with olive oil.
